items.title: Ed Woodham’s Radical Public Art
items.summary: The artist and educator on queer creativity in the margins, dogs across art history, and a collective tarot-horoscope for Hyperallergic readers.

items.title: Family Urges Help for Venezuelan Artist Trapped Under Earthquake Rubble
